name: vibe-insights
description: Vibe Insights — cross-machine, work-walled Claude Code session analytics. Coverage, where-was-I recall, token/cost (incl. the cache reveal), trends, decisions, languages, per-session friction/satisfaction/outcome, and a native-grade narrative read. MCP-agnostic decisions overlay.
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. Read by session-logger/friction-logger for the plugin_version audit field. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ and skills from .agent/skills/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
